# repfishr

[![Project Status: Active – The project has reached a stable, usable
state and is being actively
developed.](https://www.repostatus.org/badges/latest/active.svg)](https://www.repostatus.org/#active)
[![Lifecycle:
experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)
[![Build
Status](https://github.com/fdiwg/repfishr/actions/workflows/r-cmd-check.yaml/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://github.com/fdiwg/repfishr/actions/workflows/r-cmd-check.yaml)
[![CRAN_Status_Badge](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/repfishr)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=repfishr)
[![Github_Status_Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-0.1.20260716-blue.svg)](https://github.com/fdiwg/repfishr)

[repfishr](https://github.com/fdiwg/repfishr) provides tools to
facilitate the reporting of national fishery statistics to regional
fisheries management organizations, bodies and global organizations.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`get_reporting_flow_actors()`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/get_reporting_flow_actors.md)
  : Get reporting flow actors
- [`iccat_fill_report_statistical_correspondent()`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/iccat_fill_report_dataset.md)
  : Fills an ICCAT template workbook with a dataset
- [`iccat_fill_report_dataset_characteristics()`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/iccat_fill_report_dataset_characteristics.md)
  : Fills an ICCAT template workbook with dataset characteristics
  information
- [`iccat_fill_report_statistical_correspondent()`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/iccat_fill_report_statistical_correspondent.md)
  : Fills an ICCAT template workbook with statistical correspondent
  information
- [`repfishr-package`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/repfishr.md)
  [`repfishr`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/repfishr.md) :
  Fisheries data reporting flows
- [`reporting_actor`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_actor.md)
  : reporting_actor
- [`reporting_flow`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_flow.md)
  : reporting_flow
- [`reporting_format`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_format.md)
  : reporting_format
- [`reporting_receiver`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_receiver.md)
  : reporting_receiver
- [`reporting_sender`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_sender.md)
  : reporting_sender
- [`reporting_task`](https://fdiwg.github.io/repfishr/reference/reporting_task.md)
  : reporting_task
